mapper.sql: id, ad_name, ad_type, ad_position, image_url, link_url, sort, status, click_count, start_time, end_time, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM advertisement WHERE 1=1 AND ad_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND status = #{status} ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT FROM advertisement ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO advertisement (ad_name, ad_type, ad_position, image_url, link_url, sort, status, click_count, start_time, end_time, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{adName}, #{adType}, #{adPosition}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{clickCount}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE advertisement SET ad_name=#{adName}, ad_type=#{adType}, ad_position=#{adPosition}, image_url=#{imageUrl}, link_url=#{linkUrl}, sort=#{sort}, status=#{status}, start_time=#{startTime}, end_time=#{endTime}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM advertisement WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE advertisement SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE advertisement SET click_count = click_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM advertisement WHERE ad_position = #{position} AND status = 1 AND NOW() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time ORDER BY sort ASC
